title: Thinking Machine Labs Inkling now available as a Databricks-hosted model in Public Preview
body:
Model Serving now supports Thinking Machine Labs [Inkling](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#inkling) as a Databricks-hosted model. This mixture of experts (MoE) model supports text and image inputs, a 1 million token context window, and is optimized for coding, reasoning, and agentic tool-use tasks. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis).

Inkling is available in [Public Preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with [applicable terms](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
